reason: Role is On-site, New York, 5x/week (shown on form: Location Type = On-site, Location = New York). The first REQUIRED screener question is 'Are you excited and able to work from our NYC office 5x/week?'. Jamie is Portland, OR based; truthful answer is 'No'. Submitting 'No' to a required on-site screener = guaranteed auto-reject; answering 'Yes' would be fabrication (violates RULE 0 no-fabrication). This on-site-5x/week NYC requirement was NOT in the JD summary (job.json) — surfaced only on the application form.
captcha_note: Form carries an INVISIBLE reCAPTCHA v3 badge (size=invisible, self-clearing) — NOT an interactive/physical CAPTCHA, so not the blocker. The repo submitter's captcha detector is over-broad and false-flags invisible v3 as HUMAN-SUBMIT; the real blocker is the on-site eligibility screener.
form_structure: Ashby anonymous form at /application. Fields: Name (single field), Email, Resume (file upload, NO cover-letter field), then 2 required yes/no screeners (NYC 5x/week on-site; 2+ yrs People Ops exp). Submit Application button. Compensation $115K-145K + equity.
